# Neova Space

> Paris-based property atelier helping international buyers, owners and investors find, renovate and care for exceptional Parisian properties.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio overview and selected work.
- [About](/about): The atelier, philosophy and team.
- [Services](/services): Property search, renovation oversight and consultancy.
- [Method](/method): The six-movement Neova working method.
- [Projects](/projects): Selected renovations across Paris arrondissements.
- [Before / After](/before-after): Visual record of completed renovations.
- [Find your property](/find-your-property): Submit a discreet property brief.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Neova atelier in Paris.

## Optional

- [Paris VIIe](/projects/paris-7eme-ze)
- [Paris VIIIe](/projects/paris-8eme-st)
